Body.Content:
We are introducing a new URL click alert that proactively notifies security teams when a user clicks on a malicious link in Teams, helping organizations quickly identify risk and respond before further impact occurs.

GA date: March CY2026

Preview date: February CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Defender for Office 365: Introducing a new URL click alert in Teams via Microsoft Defender for Office 365
